description: Initial baseline: v0.7.0 + evolved anomaly detector
Add unit tests for wait_graph.rs (ProcessWaitState, is_freeze_safe, find_stuck_frozen, query_wait_state)
Add 30 unit tests for gpu_manager.rs (needs_cooling, recommend_power_state, optimize_for_workload, thermal_recommendations)
Add 22 unit tests for page_reclaim.rs (initial state, pressure gates, cooldowns, rate limiting, boundary conditions)
Add unit tests for analytics.rs (calculate_analytics, generate_report, get_trend, history cap)
Add 14 unit tests for coalition.rs (snapshot edge cases, rss accumulation, ProcPidCoalitionInfo layout, family_of, stability)
Experiment A: Device-aware threshold calibration (device_offset field in OverflowGuard, -0.05 on 8GB M1 Air)
Experiment B: Potential-based reward shaping (prev_pressure tracking, shaped=prev²-cur² scaled x2)
